# ensenzu

> Tool for rendering induction-motor circle diagrams and calculating operating characteristics from equivalent-circuit values or no-load / locked-rotor test values.

## Interfaces

- [GUI](https://ensenzu.shiguri.workers.dev/): For interactive use in a browser.
- [API](https://ensenzu.shiguri.workers.dev/api/diagram): POST endpoint for programmatic use agents and other tools.

The API returns an SVG diagram, calculated operating characteristics, and circle-diagram line lengths.

For the exact request body, response body, and examples, see:
https://ensenzu.shiguri.workers.dev/openapi.json
